name: GCP Artifact Registry RepositoryImage migration cleanup
__comment__: Clean up legacy scoped Artifact Registry image nodes after RepositoryImage/Image loading creates the replacement model shape.

statements.__comment__: Remove ontology image labels from scoped RepositoryImage compatibility nodes. The digest-keyed GCPArtifactRegistryImage node is the ontology Image.
statements.query: MATCH (:GCPProject {id: $PROJECT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(repo_img:GCPArtifactRegistryRepositoryImage) WHERE repo_img:Image OR repo_img:ImageManifestList OR repo_img:ImageAttestation WITH repo_img LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE REMOVE repo_img:Image, repo_img:ImageManifestList, repo_img:ImageAttestation RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Delete legacy scoped manifest edges once the canonical ImageManifestList CONTAINS_IMAGE Image edge exists.
statements.query: MATCH (:GCPProject {id: $PROJECT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(old_parent:GCPArtifactRegistryContainerImage)-[old_rel:HAS_MANIFEST|CONTAINS_IMAGE]->(old_child:GCPArtifactRegistryPlatformImage) WHERE old_parent.digest IS NOT NULL AND old_child.digest IS NOT NULL AND NOT old_parent:GCPArtifactRegistryRepositoryImage AND NOT old_parent:GCPArtifactRegistryImage AND NOT old_child:GCPArtifactRegistryImage MATCH (:GCPArtifactRegistryImage {digest: old_parent.digest})-[:CONTAINS_IMAGE]->(:GCPArtifactRegistryImage {digest: old_child.digest}) WITH old_rel LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE old_rel RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Delete legacy repository edges from old scoped container image nodes after the replacement RepositoryImage exists.
statements.query: MATCH (:GCPProject {id: $PROJECT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(old:GCPArtifactRegistryContainerImage) WHERE NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryRepositoryImage AND NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryImage AND old.digest IS NOT NULL MATCH (:GCPArtifactRegistryRepositoryImage {resource_name: old.id})-[:IMAGE]->(:GCPArtifactRegistryImage {digest: old.digest}) MATCH (:GCPArtifactRegistryRepository)-[repo_rel:CONTAINS|REPO_IMAGE]->(old) WITH repo_rel LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE repo_rel RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Delete the current project's legacy platform image resource edges after a canonical digest-keyed replacement exists.
statements.query: MATCH (:GCPProject {id: $PROJECT_ID})-[resource:RESOURCE]->(old:GCPArtifactRegistryPlatformImage) WHERE NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryImage AND old.digest IS NOT NULL MATCH (:GCPArtifactRegistryImage {digest: old.digest}) WITH resource LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE resource RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Delete the current project's legacy scoped container image resource edges after the replacement RepositoryImage exists.
statements.query: MATCH (:GCPProject {id: $PROJECT_ID})-[resource:RESOURCE]->(old:GCPArtifactRegistryContainerImage) WHERE NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryRepositoryImage AND NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryImage AND old.digest IS NOT NULL MATCH (:GCPArtifactRegistryRepositoryImage {resource_name: old.id})-[:IMAGE]->(:GCPArtifactRegistryImage {digest: old.digest}) WITH resource LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE resource RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Delete orphaned legacy platform image nodes after a canonical digest-keyed replacement exists.
statements.query: MATCH (old:GCPArtifactRegistryPlatformImage) WHERE NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryImage AND old.digest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (:GCPProject)-[:RESOURCE]->(old) AND NOT exists((old)--()) MATCH (:GCPArtifactRegistryImage {digest: old.digest}) WITH old LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE old RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Delete orphaned legacy scoped container image nodes after the replacement RepositoryImage exists.
statements.query: MATCH (old:GCPArtifactRegistryContainerImage) WHERE NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryRepositoryImage AND NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryImage AND old.digest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (:GCPProject)-[:RESOURCE]->(old) AND NOT exists((old)--()) MATCH (:GCPArtifactRegistryRepositoryImage {resource_name: old.id})-[:IMAGE]->(:GCPArtifactRegistryImage {digest: old.digest}) WITH old LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE old RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted
